title: Shield Status Fixes
description: This mod provides a fix to a bug in the popular mod "Walksy's Shield Statuses". Sometimes the mod can show the opponents shield as red even when it has not been disabled, what this mod does is double check to make sure the shield has been disabled.
body:
This mod fixes a visual bug in Walksy’s Shield Statuses where opponent shields can incorrectly appear as broken (red) even when they are still active.

It works by adding an additional verification check before displaying a broken shield, ensuring that shields are only shown as red when they have actually been broken.

This results in more accurate shield indicators and prevents misleading information during fights.
